Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 
171 
SR_SPLMTL_EDCTN_OVRL_SCRNG_IND 
LABEL: 
Screened Supplemental HRSN Education Overall Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) supplemental health related social need (HRSN) education composite indicator. 
LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_EDCTN_OVRL_SCRNG_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system 
VALUES: 
0 = Did not screen positive for education need 
1 = Screened
